title: Tommy Emmanuel Tutorials and Performances
description: Everything Tommy Emmanuel - lessons, live performances, interviews, and technique analyses. The best fingerstyle guitarist alive.

title: Andy McKee - Lessons and Performances
description: Andy McKee's catalog, full album performances, tutorials on Drifting, Rylynn, and other pieces. DADGAD and beyond.

title: Bach Guitar Transcriptions
description: Classical guitar transcriptions of Bach's lute suites, partitas, and cello suites. The most rewarding repertoire on the instrument.

title: Fingerstyle Technique Deep Dives
description: Focused lessons on specific fingerstyle techniques: Travis picking, harmonics, percussive elements, right-hand PIMA, and alternate tunings.

title: DADGAD and Alternate Tunings
description: Exploring open and alternate tunings for fingerstyle guitar. DADGAD, Open D, Open G, Dropped D, and custom tunings.

title: Jazz Guitar for the Acoustic Player
description: Jazz guitar concepts adapted for fingerstyle acoustic players. Chord melody, Drop 2 voicings, jazz standards, and the Lenny Breau approach.

title: Kaki King Performances and Analysis
description: Kaki King live videos, studio performances, and technique analysis. One of the most innovative acoustic guitarists working today.

title: Folk and Indie Fingerstyle Arrangements
description: Fingerstyle arrangements of folk and indie songs - Fleet Foxes, Iron and Wine, Bon Iver, Nick Drake, and similar artists.

title: Guitar Setup and Gear
description: Acoustic guitar setup, microphone placement, home recording, and gear for the fingerstyle player.

title: Chet Atkins and Country Fingerpicking
description: The country fingerpicking tradition - Chet Atkins, Merle Travis, and the players who built modern fingerstyle.

title: Liked Videos - Guitar
description: Videos I have liked - fingerstyle guitar performances, lessons, and music I return to.

title: Workshop Reference Videos
description: Videos I share with Dragonfly Music Center workshop students as supplemental material.

title: Lenny Breau and Advanced Jazz Guitar
description: Deep dive into Lenny Breau, jazz harmonics, and advanced jazz concepts applied to acoustic fingerstyle.

title: Percussive Guitar Techniques
description: Body slaps, tapping, snare simulation, and how modern fingerstyle players integrate percussion into guitar playing.

title: Running Playlist - Acoustic Instrumentals
description: Acoustic guitar music I run to - mostly energetic fingerstyle pieces that keep the pace up.

title: Classical Guitar Technique Videos
description: PIMA, rest stroke, free stroke, nail care, and classical right-hand technique for acoustic guitar.

title: My Uploads - Dragonfly Workshop Clips
description: Short clips from my Dragonfly Music Center workshops posted publicly as previews.

title: Nick Drake and Fingerstyle Folk
description: Nick Drake's guitar work and the tradition of British folk fingerstyle. Dadgad, CGDGAD, and other tunings used in this style.

title: Chord Melody Arrangements
description: Chord melody playing on acoustic guitar - jazz standards, folk songs, and classical pieces arranged in chord melody style.

title: Harmonic Techniques Master Class
description: Everything harmonics on guitar - natural, artificial, harp harmonics, and how Tommy Emmanuel and Lenny Breau used them.

title: Watch Later
description: Queue of videos to watch for technique and arrangement inspiration.
